decisions.what: Added top-level primary/secondary/gray Tailwind palettes alongside existing brand.* keys
decisions.why: Spec required theme.extend.colors.primary (orange) and secondary (navy) scales while preserving existing brand.primary/brand.secondary tokens used by other components

decisions.what: Used Tailwind classes (bg-primary-500, bg-secondary-900) directly in components
decisions.why: Aligns with the new theme tokens and ensures consistent application of PalmsGig brand colors across post-login UI

decisions.what: Added CardTitle and CardDescription exports to card.tsx
decisions.why: Spec required brand-consistent typography helpers; these are additive and do not break existing Card/CardHeader/CardContent/CardFooter consumers

decisions.what: Added optional collapsed state to Sidebar via internal state with optional controlled props
decisions.why: Spec required supporting a collapsed icon-only display while keeping the existing zero-arg usage in dashboard layout working

decisions.what: Switched console.log to console.warn in dashboard layout redirect
decisions.why: Project eslint rule no-console allows only warn/error; original log would trigger a warning

decisions.what: Replaced apostrophe in dashboard page heading text with '
decisions.why: Prevents react/no-unescaped-entities lint issues while preserving copy
